requirement_topic.en: Networked Charger EMC, Radio and OCPP Interoperability
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩电磁兼容、无线电及OCPP互操作
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁電磁相容、無線電及OCPP互操作

summary.en: Networked EV chargers for FSM should be documented for EMC, radio, and back-office interoperability. Electronic equipment may need FCC Part 15-style EMC evidence, and chargers with cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, or other radio modules should confirm state utility and site requirements for frequency use and import approval. For public or fleet charging, OCPP interoperability is the practical back-office protocol baseline for monitoring, billing, access control, diagnostics, and load management, even where a national FSM platform is not yet mature.
summary.zh: 面向FSM的联网充电桩应准备EMC、无线电和后台互操作文件。电子设备可能需要FCC Part 15方向的EMC证据，带蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他无线模块的设备应确认州公用事业和站点对频谱与进口要求。对于公共或车队充电，OCPP仍是监控、计费、权限控制、诊断和负载管理的主流后台协议基线，即使FSM全国性平台尚未成熟。
summary.zht: 面向FSM的聯網充電樁應準備EMC、無線電與後台互操作文件。電子設備可能需要FCC Part 15方向的EMC證據，帶蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他無線模組的設備應確認州公共事業與站點對頻譜與進口要求。對於公共或車隊充電，OCPP仍是監控、計費、權限控制、診斷與負載管理之主流後台協議基準，即使FSM全國性平台尚未成熟。

standards_or_laws: FCC Part 15 — radio-frequency devices and unintentional radiators where used as Americas-market EMC evidence
IEC 61000 series — EMC immunity, emissions, harmonics, and power-quality reference
State-utility and site radio/telecom expectations for wireless modules
OCPP — back-office communication for networked chargers

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-BMS communication. China market network chargers may use operator-specific cloud systems. These are not direct substitutes for OCPP interoperability, FCC Part 15-style EMC compliance, local radio approval context, or FSM 60 Hz platform operation.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023与电池管理系统通信。中国市场联网充电桩可采用运营商专有云体系。这些不直接替代OCPP互操作、FCC Part 15方向EMC合规、当地无线审批环境或FSM 60 Hz平台运行要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常使用GB/T 27930-2023與電池管理系統通信。中國市場聯網充電樁可能採用營運商專有雲體系。這些無法直接替代OCPP互操作、FCC Part 15方向EMC合規、當地無線核准環境或FSM 60 Hz平臺運行要求。

standards_or_laws: China EMC test evidence for domestic market access

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version required by the operator, complete back-office integration testing, provide EMC evidence suitable for a 120/240 V 60 Hz environment, verify wireless module authorization in FSM, and document cybersecurity, remote diagnostics, billing data, and load-management behavior. A GB/T-only communication stack or China-only cloud platform does not make the charger FSM-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认运营方要求的OCPP版本，完成后台集成测试，提供适用于120/240 V 60 Hz环境的EMC证据，核实FSM对无线模块的批准要求，并记录网络安全、远程诊断、计费数据、负载管理。GB/T通信栈或仅支持中国云平台不足以使充电桩FSM就绪。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認營運方要求的OCPP版本，完成後台整合測試，提供適用120/240 V 60 Hz環境之EMC證據，核實FSM對無線模組核准要求，並記錄網絡安全、遠端診斷、計費數據、負載管理。GB/T通信棧或僅支持中國雲平台不足以使充電樁FSM就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC and radio requirements apply where networking or wireless functions are used; OCPP is project-critical for public, fleet, or networked chargers where required by owner or utility process
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic communication evidence and is not direct FSM OCPP or radio approval evidence

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] FSM networked chargers need EMC, radio, and back-office evidence, not just GB/T charger-to-vehicle communication. Confirm FCC Part 15-style EMC data, state-utility communication expectations, OCPP integration, and 60 Hz power-quality behavior before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] FSM联网充电桩需要EMC、无线和后台互通证据，不是只靠GB/T车桩通信即可。发货前应确认FCC Part 15方向EMC数据、州公用事业通信期望、OCPP集成和60 Hz电能质量行为。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] FSM聯網充電樁需要EMC、無線及後台互通證據，不是僅靠GB/T車桿通信即可。發貨前應確認FCC Part 15方向EMC數據、州公共事業通信期望、OCPP整合與60 Hz電能品質表現。
